creator: fernape@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 179446
patch to the ports tree

The attached patch updates graphics/converseen to 0.9.6.1

From the website:

– Updated French Translation
– Various bugfixes

-QA:
 * portlint -AC: OK
 * poudriere builds for {10.3,11.0}{amd64,i386}: OK

I would like to step up and see if a committer has the time, patience and good willing to mentor me.

Cheers.
